title: Module 1
content:
Digital Image Fundamentals
Introduction – Origin – Steps in Digital Image Processing – Components –
Elements of Visual Perception – Image Sensing and Acquisition – Image
Sampling and Quantization – Relationships between pixels - medical
imaging applications

title: Module 2
content:
Image transforms
1D-DFT, 2D-DFT, Two dimensional orthogonal and unitary Transforms,
Cosine, Sine, Hadamard, Haar and their properties

title: Module 3
content:
Image Enhancement
Spatial Domain: Gray level transformations – Histogram processing –
Basics of Spatial Filtering– Smoothing and Sharpening Spatial Filtering –
Frequency Domain: Introduction to Fourier Transform – Smoothing and
Sharpening frequency domain filters – Ideal, Butterworth and Gaussian
filters., Application of filtering in medical images.

title: Module 4
content:
Segmentation and Representation
Detection of Discontinuities–Edge Linking and Boundary detection –
Region based segmentation - Morphological processing- erosion and
dilation, Application of edge detection - Boundary representation – Chain
Code
